runtime_color_policy.variant_rule: distinct visible color variants must be exported as distinct RGBA images
runtime_color_policy.effect_rule: source-visible color changes, flashes, fades, blends, scaling, rotation, and affine motion use Godot Shader, Material, Animation, or resource parameters

rendering_notes.godot_runtime_asset_model: ordinary RGBA textures plus source metadata

chinese_normal.note: The source PNG glyph indices are exported as role masks; runtime rendering maps role slots through RenderText material colors.

text_printer.message_effective_speed_source: GetPlayerTextSpeedDelay unless link/recorded battle overrides apply

glyph_atlas.latin_index_rule: glyph byte value indexes 16x16 cells left-to-right, top-to-bottom
glyph_atlas.chinese_index_rule: adjust high byte down after skipped 0x06/0x1B, then (hi - 1) << 8 | low

text_printer.copy_to_vram_rule: B_WIN_COPYTOVRAM skips FillWindowPixelBuffer and final PutWindowTilemap/CopyWindowToVram; normal calls fill then copy full window

unsupported.note: Source interface graphics, tilemap metadata, windows, and coordinates are imported; source-equivalent HUD rendering and interaction sequencing are not implemented yet.
Healthbox, party summary, ability popup, last-used-ball, move-info, and gimmick indicator playback remain future presentation work.
Interface sound cue symbols and timing intent are preserved as metadata only.
